commands.repair_reason: A human maintainer should decide whether to land the extra repair mitigation and clean up merge-message/proof state; there is no narrow automated code repair to request.; Cleared: No concrete security or supply-chain concern found; the diff only changes session transcript repair logic and colocated tests. commands.review_summary:
The branch adds synthetic missing-tool-result detection in session transcript repair, prefers later real duplicates over synthetic placeholders, and adds five regression tests.

Reproducibility: yes. for the transcript-level failure: current main source keeps the first duplicate result for a tool call id both globally and inside a span, so a default synthetic error before a real result remains selected. I did not reproduce the live Feishu flush race in this read-only review.
